San Diego Solar, Elevated

Custom solar solutions designed for Southern California homes. Harness the power of 266 sunny days per year with systems built for coastal living.

Call Now: 555-sol-rq5

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Sun-Powered Since 2012

Founded during San Diego's solar boom, Summit Solar began with a mission to bring premium energy independence to beach cottages and suburban homes alike. Our first installation was a 1920s Craftsman in North Park.

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our solar services.

How long do installations typically take in San Diego?

Most residential projects take 2-4 weeks from permit approval to activation. Coastal areas may require additional inspection steps, adding 1-2 weeks to the timeline.

Do you handle HOA approvals?

Yes, we're experienced with the specific requirements of planned communities like those in Carlsbad and Scripps Ranch, including color-matching panels to roof tiles.

What maintenance do systems require in our climate?

We recommend bi-annual cleaning to remove pollen and marine layer residue, plus post-Santa Ana wind inspections for inland properties.

Reviews From Our Solar Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"Summit Solar did an incredible job on our 1940s Spanish-style home in North Park. They custom-matched the mounting hardware to our clay tiles and navigated the historic district permits flawlessly. Our first SDG&E bill after installation was $18 - down from $280!"

Marissa T. Residential Solar Installation

"After losing power for 3 days during the last wildfire evacuation, we invested in a Powerwall system. The Summit team designed a solution that keeps our Scripps Ranch home running through outages. During the recent rolling blackouts, we didn't even notice when the grid went down."

James W. Solar Battery Storage

"Our Carlsbad pool is now comfortable year-round thanks to Summit's solar heating system. They integrated it perfectly with our existing equipment and the automated controls mean we never have to think about adjusting it. Kids are swimming in March!"

Lisa M. Solar Pool Heating
